title: Sealapack Ready to USE Baking Paper, 37cm x 8 METRE ROLL, Brown, SAP015,White
features: BAKE, WRAP, FREEZE: Sealapack Baking Paper Roll provides 8 metres of ready to use baking paper. No waste, cut to lsize to line cake tins, wrap food until required or wrap to freeze to use at a later date

CLEAN BAKING: Sealapack Baking Paper Roll provides 8 metres of ready to use baking paper. Release bakes from trays witout greasing. Cut to line cake tins, wrap food until required or wrap to freeze to use at a later date

LOAF TINS: Unroll from the box, cut two strips and place one in each direction inside a loaf tin, add cake mixture, bake. Use the baking sheet strips to help to lift the cake out of the tin, perfect to help remove from the tin when the cake recipe requires the cake to be decorated or cooled in the tin
FREE FROM PLASTIC: Perfect alternative if you wish to reduce the use of plastic food bags, no waste, remove enough paper to securely wrap sandwiches or picnic foods for storage and travel
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL 37CM x 8 METRES
description: Product Description Sealapack Baking Paper Roll provides 8 metres of ready to use baking paper, cut to line cake tins, wrap food until required or wrap to freeze to use at a later date. Unroll from the box, cut two strips and place one in each direction inside a loaf tin, add cake mixture, bake. Use the baking sheet strips to help to lift the cake out of the tin, perfect to help remove from the tin when the cake recipe requires the cake to be decorated or cooled in the tin. Perfect alternative if you wish to reduce the use of plastic food bags, remove enough paper to securely wrap sandwiches or picnic foods for storage and travel.
